description: Authenticode trusted-publisher allowlist for the MSIX module. Loaded at module import time by _MsixLoadTrustedPublishers in MSIX.PsfBinaries.ps1. Each entry's subjectPrefix is compared against the leaf cert's X.509 Subject of every .exe/.dll downloaded into the toolchain via _MsixVerifyAuthenticodeFolder. See CONTRIBUTING.md (Trusted-publisher governance) for the criteria and review process for new entries.

publishers.description: Microsoft Corporation (Windows SDK BuildTools incl. signtool / MakeAppx / makepri, DesktopAppInstaller msixbundle, Windows App Runtime)
Microsoft Windows signing cert used by some Microsoft-shipped binaries
Windows Phone signing cert used by deployutil.exe and related deployment binaries
Microsoft Windows Publisher cert (used to sign Sysinternals Process Monitor and DebugView)
Microsoft 3rd Party Application Component cert (used by some Sysinternals component DLLs)
Tim Mangan -- maintainer of the TMurgent fork of the Package Support Framework
TMurgent Technologies LLP -- corporate cert used for some PSF releases
